flow-definition.description: Downloads and loads the public 1000Genomes genomic dataset into HPDS. This pipeline configures the application for genomic data, pulls VCF data from the pic-sure-public-datasets repository, processes it through the VCF loader, and stages it for use by HPDS.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: Include_Genomic_Data
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: If set to true genomic data must be present or HPDS will fail to start.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: VARIANT_EXPLORER
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Enable the variant explorer. Only enable if HPDS has been loaded with Genomic data.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: ENABLE_GENE_QUERY
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Enable the genomic filtering UI which guides users creating genomic queries.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: ENABLE_SNP_QUERY
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Enable the genomic filtering UI which guides users creating genomic SNP queries.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: EXPLORER_MAX_COUNT
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Max amount of data points for the variant explorer.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: VARIANT_EXPLORER_EXCLUDE_COLUMNS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Advanced: An array of columns to exclude in the variant explorer. Example: ["AN"]

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: heapsize_mb
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Heapsize in megabytes for the VCF data loader.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: backup_current_data
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Creates a backup of the previous genomic data before replacing it with the staged data.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: clean
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Whether to delete existing genomic data first. If false, will incrementally add staged data.
